results.title: Yamaha R9 Gets A New Colour Option In The US - Here's Why Indian Fans Will Love It
results.description: The 2027 Yamaha R9, although not available in India, has captivated local enthusiasts with its new Matte Phantom Blue/Fluo Red colour option in the US. This eye-catching hue, featuring dark blue with red accents, offers a more sporty look to the supersport.
